slides.title: The quiet mineral behind *calm, steady energy*.
slides.sub: Magnesium works behind the scenes for your sleep, muscles and heart. Many people quietly fall short of it.

slides.title: An under-the-radar mineral
slides.body: Magnesium powers hundreds of small jobs in the body. Most of us *rarely think about it*.

slides.title: Sleep, muscle and heart
slides.body: It helps muscles relax and *may support* deeper sleep and a steady heartbeat. Calm starts here.

slides.title: Why people fall short
slides.body: Processed foods carry little of it, and stress can drain it. Many diets *quietly run low*.

slides.title: Where to find it
slides.body: Leafy greens, nuts, seeds and beans are rich in it. A few simple swaps *can help*.

slides.title: An easy calm win
slides.body: Lean on whole foods first. Filling the gap *may support* better rest and steadier days.

slides.title: Make calm a *daily habit*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks the food, sleep and movement that help you age well, all in one simple daily score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Magnesium is the quiet mineral most people overlook. 🌿

It supports your sleep, muscles and a steady heart, yet many diets fall short. Greens, nuts, seeds and beans are an easy place to start. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those small food habits into one daily score → link in bio.
